questions.questionText: Which callback is the first to be called when an Activity is created?
Which class is used to launch another activity in Android?
What is an 'Explicit Intent'?
options: An intent that specifies the exact component to be started
An intent that asks the system to find a suitable component
An intent used for broadcasting only
An intent that doesn't require a context

questions.questionText: How do you pass data between activities using an Intent?
Which callback is called just before the user starts interacting with the activity?
What is an 'Implicit Intent'?
options: An intent that specifies the target class name
An intent that declares a general action to perform
An intent that can only be used within the same app
An intent that carries no data

questions.questionText: Which file must all activities be declared in?
What does the 'onRestart()' callback do?
options: Called after the activity has been stopped, prior to it being started again
Called when the activity is first created
Called when the app is updated

questions.questionText: Which flag is used to ensure an activity is not kept in the history stack?
How do you retrieve a String extra from an Intent?
What is the purpose of an 'Intent Filter'?
options: To specify the types of intents that a component can respond to

questions.questionText: Which method is used to start an activity and expect a result back?
What is the 'Back Stack' in Android?
options: A set of activities arranged in the order in which they were opened
The undo history in a text editor

questions.questionText: How can you close an activity programmatically?
Which Intent action is used to open a web page in a browser?
Which launch mode creates a new instance of the activity only if it doesn't already exist at the top of the stack?
What does 'onSaveInstanceState()' do?
options: Saves data to a permanent database
Saves temporary UI state before the activity is destroyed by the system
Prevents the activity from being destroyed

questions.questionText: Which method of Intent is used to set the MIME type of data?
What happens to an Activity when the screen is rotated (by default)?
options: It is moved to the background

questions.questionText: Which callback is the final call received before an activity is destroyed?
What is the 'context' in the 'new Intent(context, Class)' constructor?
options: The current state of the application/object

questions.questionText: Which Intent flag is used to clear all activities on top of the target activity?
What is a 'PendingIntent'?
options: A token that you give to another application, which allows it to execute an Intent as if it were your app
An intent that is waiting for a network connection

questions.questionText: Which method is used to get the Intent that started the activity?
Can an Activity exist without a UI?
options: No, an activity must always have a layout
